title: CampusV - Smart Bot for College Management System
explanation: A system that provides instant Q&A support from knowledge base, Attendance management, Assignments & academic records, Fee & course information, Role-based dashboards for teachers and students.

title: SanoAwaj - Speech Emotion Recognition
explanation: A deep learning model that detects human emotions from audio using CNN and MFCC features. Got experience creating end-to-end ML pipeline including audio preprocessing, feature extraction, and model inference. SOS message will be sent to Authoritative people

title: DSA Journey - A Pathway of Mastering Data Structures and Algorithms
explanation: A complete DSA learning repository with concepts, patterns, and LeetCode solutions explained step by step. Got solid understanding of Arrays, Stacks, Linked Lists, Graphs, Trees, Queues, Prefix Sum, Two Pointers, Sliding Window, DFS, BFS, Dynamic Programming, Top K elements, Binary Tree Traversal, Backtracking.

title: Sastokinmel
explanation: Sastokinmel is a centralized price comparison website for Nepali online shoppers who want to save both money and time. SastoKinmel helps consumers quickly find the best value without confusion or regret.

title: Learning-n8n
explanation: A hands-on repository exploring workflow automation using n8n, including integrations with APIs, Google Workspace, and real-world automation use cases.

title: LLM Engineering
explanation: A collection of projects and experiments focused on building applications using large language models and prompt engineering.

title: Natural Language Processing
explanation: A repository covering NLP concepts including text preprocessing, embeddings, and model building.

title: Deep Learning
explanation: A practical implementation of deep learning models including ANN, CNN, and training pipelines.

title: Chess Game
explanation: A chess application with move validation and AI-based decision-making for gameplay.

title: Image Recognition System
explanation: A computer vision project for recognizing and classifying images using deep learning models.

title: Music Recommendation System
explanation: A system that recommends songs based on user preferences using machine learning techniques.

title: Object Oriented Programming
explanation: A repository demonstrating core OOP concepts like inheritance, polymorphism, and encapsulation with examples.

title: Machine Learning Algorithms
explanation: A revision of every possible algorithm including Linear, Polynomial, Logistic, Support Vector Machines, Decision Tree, Random Forest, K-Nearest Neighbors, Support Vector Machine, Kernel SVM, Naive Bayes, K-Means Clustering, Hierarchical Clustering, Apriori, Eclat, Thompson Sampling, Sentiment Analysis, PCA, LDA, XG-Boost, K-Fold Cross-Validation
